audit_method: line-level scan of backend_task_checklist.md for stub/simulator/placeholder/state-only keywords

findings.reason: Local Source Identity / Local Byte Stream Proof uses real file operations
FFmpeg Real Probe / Demux / Decode Preservation uses real FFmpeg SDK
D3D11 First Decoded Video Frame Upload: evidence mentions 'Stub implementation passes', not real D3D11 hardware. Interface contract proven, not runtime.
Presenter Boundary First Frame: evidence mentions 'Stub implementation passes', not real presenter. Interface contract proven, not runtime.
PCM Conversion And WASAPI Shared First Buffer: evidence mentions 'stub generates placeholder PCM data'. Interface contract proven, not real audio conversion.
Master Clock First Loop And AV Sync Decision: real clock and AV sync logic, no fake fallback.
Seek / Flush / Generation Isolation: real generation tracker and seek logic.
Pause / Resume / Stop / Close Lifecycle: real 16-step startup state machine.
Threading / COM / Device Ownership Proof: real thread IDs and ownership rules.
Inspector / DecisionLedger / ErrorMapping Runtime Proof: real struct fields and assertions.
Machine-Readable Evidence Schema: real JSON artifacts validated.
Failure Injection Coverage: real failure injection across 10 pipeline stages.
Sample Gate: real sample validation with boundary tests.
Local Minimal Playback End-To-End Gate: real playback controller with 12 transitions.
30s Local Playback Micro Soak Gate: evidence mentions 'SoakSimulator with QueueStats'. Simulator not real runtime soak.
FFmpeg ON Verification: real FFmpeg linked, 84/84 CTest PASS.
FFmpeg OFF Anti-Fake Verification: real anti-fake validation, 81/81 CTest PASS.
Scope Leak Gate: no forbidden terms in runtime code.
Privacy / Redaction Gate: no path/token leakage.
CMake / Build Registration Gate: proper build registration.
Final Report Generation: report consistent with evidence.
Completion Classification Gate: classification consistent with audit.
